word: G1865 - ἐπαθροίζω - epathroízō - ep-ath-roid'-zo - Gather thick together

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπαθροίζω

- Transliteration: Epathroizo

- Phonetic: ep-ath-roid'-zo

- Definition:

1. to gather together (to others already present)

- Origin: from G1909 and athroizo (to assemble)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1909 and ἀθροίζω athroizō (to assemble); to accumulate: - gather thick together.
